candidate_llm_application: LLM adversarial robustness as hormesis: low-intensity adversarial training improves robustness; high-intensity degrades; biphasic dose-response curve in robust accuracy.

results.title: Adversarial Training Schedule: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on adversarial training schedule, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (adversarial training schedule); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (toxicology terms vs LLM terms).
